text: The three invariant points which occur are the following: peritectic, 19 mole % UF, 18 mole % ThF, $609^{\circ}\mathsf{C}$ ; peritectic, 20.5 mole % UF, 7 mole % ThF, $500^{\circ}\mathsf{C}$ ; and eutectic, 26.5 mole % UF, 1.5 mole % ThF, $488^{\circ}\mathsf{C}$ .
